subject: Fermi  trigger No 653084584: Global MASTER-Net observations report
submitter: Vladimir Lipunov at Moscow State U/Krylov Obs  <lipunov@xray.sai.msu.ru>
body:
V. Lipunov, E. Gorbovskoy, V.Kornilov, N.Tyurina, P.Balanutsa, A.Kuznetsov, F.Balakin,

O.A. Gres, N.M. Budnev, O.Ershova 
(Irkutsk State University, API),

A. Tlatov, D. Dormidontov 
(Kislovodsk Solar Station of the Pulkovo Observatory),

V. Yurkov, A. Gabovich, Yu. Sergienko 
(Blagoveschensk Educational State University)




MASTER-Tavrida robotic telescope  (Global MASTER-Net: http://observ.pereplet.ru, Lipunov et al., 2010, Advances in Astronomy, vol. 2010, 30L)  located in Russia (Lomonosov MSU, SAI Crimea astronomical station) started inspect of the Fermi GRB210911.85 (trigger No 653084584,20h 06m 38.40s , +17d 48m 00.0s, R=6.02) errorbox  1419 sec after notice time and 1775 sec after trigger time at 2021-09-11 20:52:34 UT, with upper limit up to  18.5 mag. The observations began at zenith distance = 40 deg. The sun  altitude  is -40.5 deg. 

The galactic latitude b = -8 deg., longitude l = 58 deg.


Real time updated cover map and OT discovered available here: 
https://master.sai.msu.ru/site/master2/observ.php?id=1717913

We obtain a following upper limits.
